query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `accountPermissions` (
  `id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL,
  `accountId` int NOT NULL,
  `permission` varchar(100) NOT NULL,
  `createdAt` timestamp DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,
  PRIMARY KEY (`id`),
  UNIQUE KEY `account_permission_unique` (`accountId`, `permission`),
  INDEX `account_id_idx` (`accountId`)
);

mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user SQg17LQaPsV51m8.32b9e2c038f9 --database jtCSa4Dgw9WMNzinVreVWF --execute CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `accountPermissions` (
  `id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL,
  `accountId` int NOT NULL,
  `permission` varchar(100) NOT NULL,
  `createdAt` timestamp DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,
  PRIMARY KEY (`id`),
  UNIQUE KEY `account_permission_unique` (`accountId`, `permission`),
  INDEX `account_id_idx` (`accountId`)
);
